payload.title: Our First Online Conference: Advances in Physics
payload.rawTitle:
CONJECTURE INSTITUTE
APR 23
Our First Online Conference: Advances in Physics
On June 17th, Conjecture Institute brings together physicists working on constructor theory, foundations of quantum theory, locality, quantum gravity, time, and other fundamental areas.
CONJECTURE INSTITUTE∙3 MIN READ
